steps.code:
<?php
require_once 'wp-load.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/image.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/media.php';

update_option('permalink_structure', '/%postname%/');
$home = get_page_by_path('sample-page');
if ($home) {
	update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
	update_option('page_on_front', $home->ID);
}

$image_ids = [];
for ($i = 1; $i <= 3; $i++) {
    $url = "https://picsum.photos/id/" . ($i + 20) . "/1024/682.jpg";
    $tmp = download_url($url);
    if (!is_wp_error($tmp)) {
        $file_array = array('name' => "demo-image-$i.jpg", 'tmp_name' => $tmp);
        $id = media_handle_sideload($file_array, 0);
        if (!is_wp_error($id)) $image_ids[] = $id;
    }
}

for ($i = 1; $i <= 10; $i++) {
    $post_id = wp_insert_post(array(
        'post_title'   => "Sample Post #$i",
        'post_content' => "This is a demo post for the Any Block Carousel Slider plugin.",
        'post_status'  => 'publish',
        'post_type'    => 'post',
    ));
    if ($post_id && !empty($image_ids)) {
        $img_id = $image_ids[($i % count($image_ids))];
        set_post_thumbnail($post_id, $img_id);
    }
}
